summary: The project-health Skill now consumes agent_next.safe_next_command for fresh projects, runs the safe preview before asking for confirmation, and forbids pasting raw doctor/setup/init JSON or repeated recovery_actions to users. This keeps natural-language OpenNori use routed through Skills while CLI JSON remains the agent state layer.
reviewability: Inspect the Skill reply-shape and misuse guards, then rerun the targeted tests checking safe_next_command and package Skill asset text.
limitations: This covers project-health handoff behavior; broader AC discovery remains the next dogfood step.
